_comment: Single-config follow-on to xid-aibq2-core: run NoBel(Kimi-K2.5) on AIBQ2 so tab:aibq2-sota can show both NoBel(Pro) and NoBel(K2.5) baselines alongside their BLF counterparts. Same exam (aibq2-all, n=113), same 5-trial setup. After this finishes: collate, aggregate (mean:5,shrink-prior-loo:5,shrink-std-loo:5), then calibrate --no-exam-restrict.
